free_text: Metallic lithium and LiF targets were used. Where
residual activity was measured, the targets were LiF
evaporated onto thick copper backings. When prompt
spectra were taken, the targets were evaporated onto
30-mu-g/cm2 carbon backings. The Li metal targets
were transferred into the chamber in vacuum.
The thickness of all the LiF targets was taken to be
that determined by the resonance technique, and the
thickness of the Li metal targets was taken to be that
cross section in all cases. Major uncertainties in the

Tracks in a sheet of cellulose nitrate plastic
of delayed alpha-particles from the 8Li decay were
counted. This detector is insensitive to electrons.
It located inside a can in the chamber, rotated
around the target subtending a nearly 2Pi solid angle.
